app_brand_tagline: A living garden for shifting perspective.
app_pet_alt: Ragdoll-style pet sitting in the garden.
pet_onboarding_complete: Your pet pads into the garden with you.
pet_seed_planted: Your pet gives a proud head-butt. A new seed is planted.
pet_seed_watered: You watered this seed with one kind action.
pet_empty_garden: Your pet settles beside the empty garden.
pet_signal_glowing: A signal is glowing. Move through it one lens at a time.
pet_follow_glowing_lens: Follow the glowing lens one step at a time.
pet_journey_becomes_seed: The lens journey becomes a seed. Plant it in the soil.
pet_signal_settles: The signal settles back into the garden.
home_title: Move one signal through seven gentle lenses.
home_description: Your pet helps you notice inner signals without turning them into who you are. Each completed journey becomes a seed in your Dream Garden.
garden_pending_seed_status: Place the seed in an open soil spot.
garden_seed_ready_available: Drag it into the soil, or plant it here with the accessible control.
garden_seed_ready_full: The designed soil spots are full for now.
garden_keyboard_controls: Dream Garden keyboard controls. Start the glowing signal to begin a lens journey. Use Plant Here when a seed is ready.
archive_empty: No seeds yet. Your first lens journey plants one.
settings_data_description: Reflection text, seeds, the lens profile, drafts, and settings stay on this device, in this browser. Nothing is uploaded, and no AI service ever reads your reflections.
settings_profile_reset_warning: This discards your journey in progress.
onboarding_title: How does experience usually arrive for you?
onboarding_description: This only changes the order and emphasis of garden prompts. It is stored locally and is not a diagnosis.
lens_word_field: What word or story is attached?
lens_word_helper: Name the label as something appearing, not as the whole of you.
lens_body_field: Where does this show up in your body?
lens_body_helper: A sensation, posture, temperature, pressure, or energy is enough.
lens_emotion_helper: Use one word, several words, or a rough atmosphere.
lens_image_field: If this had an image, what would it look like?
lens_image_helper: A color, texture, scene, shape, or symbol can work.
lens_observer_helper: This can be simple: "something in me is aware of it."
lens_meaning_field: What else could be true beyond the first label?
lens_meaning_helper: Try a kinder or wider meaning without forcing positivity.
lens_action_field: What is one tiny kind action?
lens_action_helper: One doable compassionate step is enough.
lens_default_tiny_action: Offer myself one small kind pause.
lens_panel_label: Move this signal through the current lens
garden_accessibility_empty: Dream Garden. No seeds planted yet. Your pet is resting in the garden.
garden_accessibility_visible_one: Dream Garden. {visibleCount} seed visible. Tap your pet for a gentle head-butt or tap a seed to open it.
garden_accessibility_visible_many: Dream Garden. {visibleCount} seeds visible. Tap your pet for a gentle head-butt or tap a seed to open it.
garden_accessibility_hidden: Dream Garden. {visibleCount} seeds visible and {hiddenCount} older saved. Tap your pet for a gentle head-butt or tap a seed to open it.
seed_stage_flower_description: The action has become a flower in the garden.
seed_stage_growing_description: One final reflection can decide whether this becomes a flower.
seed_stage_sprout_description: Water it once more by noticing what changed and choosing the next kind version.
seed_stage_seed_description: Water it with one softened label and one small action.
seed_prompt_after_label: What did you notice after trying this?
seed_prompt_after_placeholder: Name what shifted, even if it was small.
seed_prompt_next_action: What is the next kind version?
seed_prompt_first_label: How can this label soften today?
seed_prompt_first_placeholder: The story "{text}" can soften into one passing thought.
seed_prompt_first_action: What small action gives this seed water?
seed_error_watering_requires_fields: Seed watering requires a softened label and kind action.
seed_error_bloom_requires_two_waterings: Seed bloom requires two waterings before final reflection.
seed_dialog_validation_watering: Add both a softened label and one small action before watering.
seed_dialog_validation_bloom: Add one reflection before the seed becomes a flower.
seed_dialog_bloom_legend: Did this goal/action happen, change, or need more care?
seed_dialog_bloom_label: What does this seed become now?
seed_dialog_bloom_placeholder: Name what grew from this small action.
app_error_watering_save: This watering could not be saved.
app_error_bloom_save: This reflection could not be saved.
